text: SUMMARY: Frontend-focused Software Engineer with 4.5+ years of industry experience in developing web and mobile applications. Proven track record of building scalable and user-friendly interfaces using React and React Native, reaching thousands of users. Passionate about delivering digital solutions that solve real-world challenges and improve user experience.
